email_subject: Application for Sales Support / Admin (Rechterhand Sales Supervisor) – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Sales Support / Admin (Rechterhand Sales Supervisor) position at VIVALDIS, as advertised on VDAB. With a background in digital marketing, customer-facing roles, and technical problem-solving, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client relationships, track orders and projects from start to finish, and ensure timely delivery. I am comfortable with MS Office and ERP systems, and I have strong administrative and communication skills. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie taught me accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced environment.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I am eager to bring my organizational skills and customer focus to VIVALDIS.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Sales Support / Admin (Rechterhand Sales Supervisor) position at VIVALDIS. With a strong foundation in customer relations, administrative coordination, and technical problem-solving, I am well-prepared to support your sales team and ensure smooth order-to-delivery processes.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client accounts, oversee project timelines, and communicate proactively to resolve issues. I am responsible for tracking orders, preparing quotes, and ensuring client satisfaction—skills directly transferable to this role. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie further honed my ability to maintain accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume environment.

I am proficient in MS Office and have hands-on experience with ERP-like systems for order management and reporting. I am comfortable with data analysis and problem-solving, which I apply daily to optimize processes. My technical background in web development and SEO has given me a knack for troubleshooting and finding creative solutions.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively learning Dutch (currently A2). I thrive in a team-oriented environment and enjoy building trust with clients and colleagues alike. I am eager to bring my organizational skills, customer focus, and technical affinity to VIVALDIS.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proven experience in customer relations and order follow-up from client inquiry to delivery and invoicing.
Strong administrative skills: managing client dossiers, preparing quotes, tracking orders, and coordinating with internal teams.
Proficient in MS Office and comfortable with ERP systems for data entry, reporting, and process management.
Bilingual in English and Turkish, with active Dutch language development (A2).
Technical problem-solving ability and experience in a fast-paced, detail-oriented environment.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I manage client relationships, track orders from start to finish, and ensure timely delivery. I am comfortable with MS Office and ERP systems, and I have strong administrative and communication skills. My experience in logistics taught me accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced environment. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2).

CORE SKILLS
- Customer relations & order management: client dossier management, order follow-up, quote preparation, invoicing support
- Administrative support: data entry, reporting, process coordination, problem-solving
- MS Office & ERP: proficient in Excel, Word, Outlook; experience with ERP-like systems for tracking and reporting
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
